description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a deep, rich purple upholstery. The seat and backrest are divided into two equal sections, each featuring a single, centered tufted button for subtle visual interest. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, contemporary look. The base is low and solid, with the legs barely visible, suggesting a sturdy and grounded construction. The cushions appear thick and plush, providing ample comfort for sitting. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or contrasting materials.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa in deep purple with tufted seat and back cushions, broad straight armrests, and a minimalist design. The upholstery is smooth and the base is low and solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, tufted back cushions and matching seat cushions, with broad armrests on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick armrest, the depth of the seat, and the profile of the tufted back cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the seamless upholstery across the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all with centered tufted buttons; cushions appear attached and evenly divided.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat height, rectangular profile, fully upholstered with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are minimally visible, likely block-style and recessed at the corners, suggesting a sturdy, low-profile base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest divided into two segments, each with a single tufted button and attached cushion.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and subtle tufted detailing on the cushions.
